name: Massive MCP Server — Attention Data Platform
what_it_does: Massive MCP Server providing AI agents access to Massive.io's attention and engagement data platform — querying user attention metrics, engagement data, and platform analytics for advertising and monetization workflows, integrating Massive's alternative data marketplace into agent-driven analytics and media buying workflows.
use_cases: Querying user attention and engagement metrics from advertising analytics agents
Accessing Massive's alternative data for campaign planning from media buying agents
Analyzing engagement patterns from content optimization agents
Integrating attention data into AI-driven ad tech from marketing agents
Fetching platform performance metrics from monetization agents
Building attention-first campaign analytics from brand measurement agents
not_for: Teams without Massive.io accounts or data subscriptions
General web analytics (use Google Analytics or Mixpanel MCPs)
GDPR-sensitive use cases without proper data processing agreements
best_when: An adtech or media team needs AI agents to access Massive's attention and engagement data platform for advertising analytics and campaign optimization.
avoid_when: You don't use Massive.io or need different advertising analytics — use Google Ads, Meta Ads, or general analytics MCPs.

auth.notes: Massive.io API key required. Requires Massive.io account and data subscription access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No known free tier — Massive.io is an enterprise data platform
pricing.notes: Massive.io is a commercial data platform. MCP server is official from Massive.io. Enterprise pricing applies.

known_agent_gotchas: Requires Massive.io enterprise account — not self-service or free
API documentation may be limited to paying customers
Attention data terminology is platform-specific — require Massive.io domain knowledge
Rate limits tied to subscription tier — may throttle at scale
Official MCP from Massive.io — quality higher than community but narrowly focused
Data freshness depends on Massive.io's data pipeline cadence
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key required. Official Massive.io MCP. Enterprise data — handle user attention data per GDPR/CCPA requirements. Secure API key storage.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key. Official MCP. Handle user data per GDPR/CCPA. Secure key storage.
